title: Extract a fixed-width version prefix with binary pattern matching
prompt: Write `MyApp.Versioned.parse/1` that accepts a binary like `"v12packet-data"` where the version is always exactly two ASCII bytes after the `v` (i.e., `"v12" ++ payload`). Use a single function head: `def parse(<<"v", major::utf8, minor::utf8, rest::binary>>)` returning `{:ok, [<<major>>, <<minor>>], rest}`. Add a catch-all clause returning `{:error, :bad_format}`. Output a complete `defmodule MyApp.Versioned do ... end`.
tier_rationale: Straightforward structured-binary pattern. Skill must know the `::utf8` modifier shorthand but there's no ambiguity.
